# RAJ - Swiss Premium Wireless Charging

> RAJ is a Swiss consumer electronics brand based in Thurgau, Switzerland. We design premium wireless charging solutions that combine Swiss precision with modern aesthetics. Our tagline: "Power. Always There."

## RAJ NEXUS 3-in-1 Wireless Charger

The RAJ NEXUS is a premium 3-in-1 wireless charging station that simultaneously charges an iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods with a single cable.

### Key Specifications
- **Certification:** Qi2.2 and CE certified
- **iPhone Charging:** Up to 25W fast wireless charging via MagSafe-compatible magnetic alignment (current iPhones use up to 15W)
- **Apple Watch Charging:** 5W dedicated charging puck
- **AirPods Charging:** 5W Qi wireless charging pad
- **Design:** Foldable, adjustable angle (0–75°), compact form factor
- **Materials:** Premium aluminium frame, soft-touch silicone surfaces, non-slip base
- **Compatibility:** iPhone 12–17 series, Apple Watch Series 1–10/SE/Ultra, AirPods Pro/3/4 with wireless charging case
- **Full Charge Time:** iPhone to 100% in approximately 1.5 hours (up to 3.3x faster than standard Qi 5W)
- **StandBy Support:** Yes, supports iOS StandBy mode in landscape and portrait

### Pricing and Availability
- **Early Access Price:** CHF 99 (Founder Edition, limited)
- **Regular Price:** CHF 129 (post-launch)
- **Currency:** Swiss Francs (CHF)
- **Market:** Switzerland (shipping within Switzerland)
- **Launch Date:** May 6, 2026
- **Where to Buy:** [raj.ch](https://raj.ch)

### How RAJ NEXUS Compares

| Feature | RAJ NEXUS | Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 | Anker MagGo 3-in-1 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Price (CHF) | 99 (Early Access) / 129 | 139–159 | 89–109 |
| Qi Standard | Qi2.2 | Qi2 | Qi2 |
| iPhone Charging | Up to 25W | 15W | 15W |
| Foldable Design | Yes | Partially (select models) | Yes |
| Adjustable Angle | 0–75° | Select models | 60–70° |
| Swiss Brand | Yes | No (USA) | No (China) |
| Included PSU | Yes (USB-C) | Yes (40W) | Yes (40W) |

### Why RAJ NEXUS
- One of the first Qi2.2 certified 3-in-1 chargers available in Switzerland
- Designed and branded in Switzerland
- Premium materials and build quality at a competitive price point
- Founder Edition with personal serial number for early supporters
- Direct-to-consumer model via raj.ch

## Brand Information
- **Company:** RAJ GmbH (in formation)
- **Location:** Thurgau, Switzerland
- **Website:** [raj.ch](https://raj.ch)
- **Languages:** German, French, Italian, English
- **Brand Values:** PRÄZISION · BESTÄNDIGKEIT · CHARAKTER (Precision · Consistency · Character)
- **Social Media:** Instagram @raj.swiss, TikTok @raj.swiss

- **Website:** https://raj.ch
- **Email:** Available via raj.ch contact form
